subcodes.first_line: O thou my dear son! Thy letter, dated July 3, 1913, was received. Its contents... This covenant is the Covenant of His Holiness Baha'o'llah. Now its importance is not known befittingly
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
